{% load i18n %} {# The single HTMX-swappable play region. Every answer/hint post returns it. #}
{% if progress.is_finished or hunt.status == 'finished' %}

🏁 {% trans "You made it!" %}

{% blocktrans with points=progress.total_points %}Your team finished with {{ points }} points.{% endblocktrans %}

{% trans "See Results" %}
{% elif not station %}
{% trans "Waiting for the hunt to start…" %}

{% blocktrans with order=station.order total=station_count %}Station {{ order }} of {{ total }}{% endblocktrans %}

{{ station.name }}

{{ progress.total_points }} {% trans "pts" %}

{% endif %} {% if station.photo %} {% endif %} {% if station.requires_gps and not attempt.arrived_at %}

{% trans "Get to the location to unlock this station." %}

—
{% if hunt.navigation_mode == 'compass' %}
{# iOS only fires orientation events after an explicit user-gesture grant #} {% endif %}

{% trans "Location is unavailable on this device. Ask a teammate to navigate!" %}

{% if not station.requires_gps or attempt.arrived_at %}

{% trans "Find the QR code and scan it." %}

📷 {% trans "Open Scanner" %} {% else %}

{% trans "Reach the location first, then scan the QR code you find there." %}

{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% else %} {# --- Challenge state --- #} {% if attempt.arrived_at or attempt.scanned_at %}
✅ {% trans "Station unlocked" %}
{% endif %} {# Challenge progress dots #} {% if challenge_states|length > 1 %}
{% for challenge, ca in challenge_states %} {% endfor %}
{% endif %} {% if current_challenge %}

{{ current_challenge.question|linebreaks }}

{% csrf_token %} {% if current_challenge.challenge_type == 'multiple_choice' and current_challenge.options %}
{% for key, value in current_challenge.options.items %} {% endfor %}
{% elif current_challenge.challenge_type == 'photo_task' %} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% if current_challenge_attempt and current_challenge_attempt.attempts_count > 0 and not current_challenge_attempt.is_correct %}

{% blocktrans with count=current_challenge_attempt.attempts_count %}Not quite — {{ count }} tries so far. Keep going!{% endblocktrans %}

{% endif %} {# --- Hints --- #} {% if current_challenge.hint_1 or current_challenge.hint_2 or current_challenge.hint_3 %}

{% trans "Hints (cost points)" %}

{% if current_challenge.hint_1 %} {% if 1 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_1 }}
{% else %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if current_challenge.hint_2 %} {% if 2 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_2 }}
{% else %} {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if current_challenge.hint_3 %} {% if 3 in current_hints_used %}
💡 {{ current_challenge.hint_3 }}
{% else %} {% endif %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
